text.p: Hello Mazi ,
THANKS FOR YOUR PIECE. WE ARE BOOKED FOR DALLAS TX TX=Texas TOMORROW ON A CHURCH CONFERENCE. HAVE TO TAKE THE CHURCH MEMBERS FOR THIS TRIP. BACK ON SAT. THANKS FOR YOUR PRAYERS.
GRACE TO YOU.
Mazi ,

Please forgive my sins and trespasses. I am guilty indeed. First you sent a mail. No reply. You sent your nice pics and even with your handsome looks that is fair to go for another wife 9they in skirts look for such handsome , cashy fellows ) yet I just got busy to reply. Really busy. Looking for jobs and sitting late night on my computer. Beloved its been really serious coping, after the last job in December 2006, but Jehovah is King. He rules in the affairs of men

How are you doing with studies ? Well, you look good, well fed and strong. That must be as a result of'mana' from the heavens. Whichever way you are employing to stay afloat, may God help and see you through.

We are doing fine. Please pray for my wife's health. She is undergoing series of tests for some canceroius cells on her breast. But we are full of life and demand every prayer and trusting the good Lord to clear all by our next visit to the hospital.(For your information only, please.)
God bless you real good.
<> wrote:
Chief ,
Stop this madness
Beloved,

A pornographic movie is being shot and is intended to show up in America soon, which shows Jesus and his disciples as having homosexual relations. This is similar to a play that has been in the Theatre halls for a while. It's called Corpus Christi" which means "The Body of Christ". It is a revolting joke of our Lord. But we can make a difference, that's why I'm sending this e-mail to all of you. Could you, please, add your name to this e-mail's list's end? If you do so, together we may be able to ban this movie from being shown in America . I learnt that , some regions have banned the movie already.

All we need is a lot of signatures! Remember, Jesus said:"That he who denies Me before men, I will also deny Him before my Father which is in heaven." Please, do not simply forward!!! Please, select all the text by dragging mouse down on this message. Copy message (CTRL+C), then select "compose" which gives you a new email page, position cursor in the message box & paste (CTRL+V). Edit any unwanted text, add your name at the end of the list and send to all your contacts. When the signatures get to 500 names, whoever is the 500th name, please forward this email to:
And then start it all over again...... IF WE WORK TOGETHER WE CAN MAKE IT!!!!
Thanks!
My beloved ,

Thanks for your good fight. It may seem bleak and out of balance for now, but you can be assured that all will be well. Hang in to your God. I am a man of experience and I speak with God given wisdom: O TEE AKA O JI DI OJO, KA OGA EMESI DI MMA.

Now if your permanent residence is in sight, there may be need to stay put and grab that one. With it you can move around the EU region for one fellowship or another. You surely will be ok. But please, keep your ears open. Out here, there is no permanent friend or enemy. Everything is fast paced. Stay close to Him and keep yourself warm. I mean real warm. Its -10 oF oF=degree Fahrenheit here, will be colder in the days ahead but we are doing great. Schools closed for 3 days while I stayed on with the kids and work around on my system for job opportunities. has started with Good Sameritan Hospital.
The Church is making progress. I also seldom give a big thought on business, international biz. Pray for me. But I know it is well with all of us. Greet your wife and children.
Shalom.
same old,
Hello my brethren,
Above, please find links to 4 universities in Finland. Try to locate your disciple or something close to it; then apply immediately. Please, immediately.

I think this is a rare opportunity you may wish to look at. Most of these schools offer scholarships and visa issue comes after the admission is complete. Try these and follow up immediately. Admission closes in March for the year, otherwise you will wait for another time.
Act fast, please.
Re: How about Okpa d oku? Any in Poland?
Hai ,

It is certain that the eagle flies high. The king of birds does not go for cheap, berated animals or prey. It stoops to conquer. Mr. of blessed memory was not mistaken to give you the name' '. And I know your lot has fallen on pleasant places, the wealth of the nations are for your grabs, yes for the anointed. I want to encourage you to check on Him and find out His counsel concerning the things that remain of Poland. Give me words, and that fast too. Do you have your visa inside your'kpali'? I were ike inwete ihe i ga eji bilie njem. I am talking about ihe eji a gafe uzo. Kedu maka Finland. Check the internet. Anyi huru otutu skolaship nulo akwukwo n'ebahu. Mee ososo. Bell ndi uka na aku.

Grace to you. I am still looking for a job. is due to start job by next week but our surprise and fear came on us regarding her funding: the hospital is going to collect 50% of her pay. Imagine the 419 419=the 419 Nigerian Scam. That leaves me with doing everything under tthe sun to continue the struggle until 3 years time. By which time the money borrowed for her school will be paid off. But it is well with us here. Jehovah bu Eze.
Get back to me fast, please.
Nwke m, Olia? Kedu ka eke si anya anwu? Anything yet? I am still looking and trusting God for a way. The Lord is faithful, lets wait for His salvation.
Just felt like seeing you and embracing you. Greet your prof and family for me.
Jisie ike.
Mazi ,

I am not of the extraction that trouble Israel; in fact, I am determined to be a blessing to all and sundry incluuding you. So here is my wife's cell number: and my house is (I'm scarcely at home especially during the week days). Now concerning what we talked about, do your best to obtain your extended visa stamped in your passport. Urge your oga to find some in-school job no matter where and what. As long as it fetches a dime to feed the stomach. I suppose you dont go rioting there. Do take some rest and plan ahead. Open the web and look around the schools and possible' igba oso' if' ihe aturu anya ya emeghi ka esi wee hazie ya'.

Now open an account, send the number. Understand? Be a good boy. I am booked to stop work by next week. Pray for another job, please. I will call you another time by 3am, so be prepared to lose your sleep. Student no soppose rest keeeh.
Gisie ike. Nwoke nife.
Keep warm, please.
Gracia.

You are welcome to the Polish place. I trust the Lord will settle you asap. I also know that you will find the' ego igwe' at the right time, not excluding your PhD bout. I have resigned to professional IT Audit and the industry is my haven. As for the preaching of the word and mentoring the people into heaven, it remains an eternal occupation which I will enjoin you to hold tightly to in Poland. You will understand what I mean.

Now can I have your telephone number, house or hostel address and your professor's cell and office number. You know I am your next of kin and guardian and I am answerable to the mother land on your account. Call immediately. He is sick but still looks out for you. Cell: ; Home:
Now you know how to get me on my cell: ; Home:
Let me know how things fare with you, please.

completed her course on Nov. 17, we did the party on the 18th and she will sit for the board before the end of the year. You will have to come over for the celebration of my wealth very soon. Just pray for .

Now answer this: How can you leave for airport by 3pm for a flight scheduled for 10 or 11pm? I called 's house to learn you had gone... gone so early to the chargrin of my final departure instructions and advice? I just hope you have your winter coat.
Let me hear from you, please.
May the good Lord keep you and rain His favour on you.
Mazi ,

Congratulations and to God be the glory. You are welcome to the West, where tax, bills, and all undefined pressures take center stage in men's lives. They choke the Holy Ghost off you and mean every word of it. Their scheme is to drag us to hell. It is of course too late to suggest that. So be prepared for the fight. I am glad you are mking a head way to deliver the Western world (though Poland is faded glory of the West)
See you on the pay day.
Hello Mazi ,

Hope you are getting ready. Have you obtained a sure word ffrom the school? Have they sent the letter? And what about your ticket? I talked with bbro about this matter. He got no problems with writing a letter. He wants to make sure that the school has a plan for your sustainence and money for your fees so that you dont go and be stranded. Make double sure, please.
Here is 's telephone number:
's is:
Keep hope alive.
Mazi ,
Kindly send the mail as we discussed. If you have, it could be that I deleted it by mistake. I am arranging a serious discussion with brother on this matter. Send it to :
copy ,
I wait for the mail. Hope you've contacted the school.
Thanks for your concern and love. Bro said you e-mailed sometime ago. Thanks for your love and care.
's no is and Papa is with her at (). Help me to plead my case that it will be well very soon. Seems they are all weary of waiting. The just shall live by faith.
God bless you as you travel and please bring back some
' okpa' and agric loaf.
Talk to you later.
